fields.label: BOUNDARY
fields.value: Frontend (React/TypeScript) and backend (FastAPI/Python) live in one repo.

fields.label: CONTRACT
fields.value: Every cross-layer change starts with a written API contract mapping snake_case (backend) ↔ camelCase (frontend) — parallel agents implement against it.

fields.label: SPEC FORMAT
fields.value: Acceptance Criteria are written in Behavior-Driven Development (BDD) style — Given/When/Then/And scenarios — so every Playwright test mirrors the spec 1:1.

rows.detail: Playwright, including a visual-report pipeline that renders every page to HTML for human review.

rows.aiDid: Architect proposed component tree + API contract
rows.iDecided: Approved scope, rejected over-abstraction, set sacred constraints
rows.outcome: Each ticket ships with a verifiable artefact trail

rows.iDecided: Confirmed root cause, approved fix strategy

rows.aiDid: Designer produced Pencil spec per each visual ticket
rows.iDecided: Selected visual direction (A/B/C options), approved design-locked gate

folderStructure.comment: Hand-authored. Edit here; generator emits to README FOLDER-STRUCTURE marker block.
tree: ├── backend/              # FastAPI app, Pydantic models, predictor, auth, pytest suite
├── content/              # Hand-edited SSOT JSON (stack, process rules, folder structure)
│   ├── tickets/          # K-001 … K-06x ticket files (AC + retrospective)
│   ├── public/           # Static assets served by Firebase Hosting
│       └── utils/        # Pure utilities (stats, API, analytics, diary sort)
├── history_database/     # Binance ETHUSDT 1h + daily OHLC CSVs
└── ssot/                 # Project SSOT (system-overview, PRD, conventions, workflow)

steps.description: Drop in a CSV of 24 × 1H OHLC bars. The reference sample.
steps.title: Upload

steps.description: Cosine similarity walks the history database to rank windows.
steps.title: Scan

steps.description: Show the price action that followed each matched window.
steps.title: Project

processRules.summary: when a code reviewer finds a bug, the responsible role writes a short retrospective naming the root cause before any fix begins.
processRules.title: Bug Found Protocol

processRules.summary: for any user-voice document (README, portfolio copy, CV), PM pauses the pipeline until the operator approves the verbatim draft.
processRules.title: Content-Alignment Gate

processRules.summary: before any deploy, every unmerged ticket branch is rebased onto the current main and then fast-forward merged in.
processRules.title: Deploy rebase-then-FF-merge

processRules.summary: only the Designer role edits the `.pen` design files; every other role reads the exported JSON + PNG. The code reviewer runs a line-by-line parity check between the design and the shipped component. Added during K-034 after shipped components kept diverging from the design without anyone noticing. See [docs/tickets/K-034](./docs/tickets/K-034-about-spec-audit-and-workflow-codification.md).
processRules.title: Pencil as design source of truth

processRules.summary: the role table in this README is wrapped in `<!-- ROLES:start -->` / `<!-- ROLES:end -->` markers and regenerated from a single JSON file.
processRules.title: Locked marker block

processRules.summary: before opening any PR that touches Dockerfile, package*.json, .gcloudignore, or deploy scripts, run `docker build -f Dockerfile .` locally. catches build-time blockers (env injection, lockfile drift, missing binaries) before a Cloud Build round-trip.
processRules.title: Deploy local docker dry-run

processRules.summary: backend integration tests use the actual ETHUSDT-1h Binance CSV fixture, not fabricated data. mock data passes when the real format drifts; only a real-CSV integration test catches the exact failure mode (Sacred floor misalignment under real bar counts).
processRules.title: Real CSV integration test mandatory

processRules.summary: `content/site-content.json` is the single hand-edited source for portfolio metrics, stack, processRules, and renderSlots. the generator `build-ticket-derived-ssot.mjs` auto-fills computed fields and writes README marker blocks from it — no ticket data lives in more than one hand-edited file.
processRules.title: Ticket-derived SSOT pipeline

processRules.summary: before any page-level implementation, PM/Engineer/Reviewer/QA verify which components in `frontend/src/components/` are used on ≥2 routes. prevents page-scoped changes from silently breaking shared components — a 5-role × 2-ticket miss (K-035 duplicate Footer) is diagnostic of a missing structural check, not individual carelessness.
processRules.title: Shared component inventory check

processRules.summary: Pencil `.pen` files own the visual SSOT (layout, spacing, color tokens); TypeScript source files own the textual SSOT (role names, copy, descriptions). changes to one surface are reflected in the other through a defined Designer handoff — never duplicate content between the two.
processRules.title: Split SSOT: visual vs textual

processRules.summary: the cross-layer API contract between frontend and backend is locked by a SSOT fixture in the E2E test suite (`compute_stats` response shape). any backend change that breaks the fixture requires a PM-approved contract renegotiation, not a silent AC amendment.
processRules.title: Contract test SSOT fixture

processRules.summary: before releasing Engineer on any ticket, PM cross-checks the ticket's target scope against all active Sacred clause IDs in `docs/sacred-registry.md`. AC conflicts with an invariant block the ticket until the invariant is formally modified or retired.
processRules.title: Sacred regression inventory audit

processRules.summary: the code reviewer runs a line-by-line parity check between the Pencil design JSON (`specs/<frame>.json`) and the shipped component props, including typography, spacing, and color tokens. divergences not listed in `design-exemptions.md` are Critical findings that block merge.
processRules.title: Pencil–code parity code review

processRules.summary: every per-role retrospective entry includes a mandatory **Slowest step** field that names the single bottleneck step and its root cause. tracks which process steps compound slowness across multiple tickets.
processRules.title: Retro slowest step mandatory

processRules.summary: before opening a PR for any ticket with `visual-delta: yes`, the Pencil `.pen` file, design doc spec tables, and `design-locked: true` flag must all be updated to match the shipped state. prevents future Designer sessions from working off stale specs.
processRules.title: Visual SSOT sync gate

processRules.summary: before committing any AC whose verification grep targets a count, run the grep against the current codebase and confirm the raw count is non-zero and plausible. a pre-existing-zero match means the AC always passes regardless of whether the target code was added.
processRules.title: AC grep raw-count sanity

processRules.summary: README marker blocks (`<!-- STACK:start -->`, `<!-- NAMED-ARTEFACTS:start -->`, `<!-- FOLDER-STRUCTURE:start -->`) are generated by `build-ticket-derived-ssot.mjs` from `content/site-content.json`. never hand-edit content inside a marker block — the generator overwrites it on the next run.
processRules.title: Marker block generator discipline
